title: OSI Ontology Metadata Specification
description: JSON Schema for validating OSI (Open Semantic Interoperability) ontology definitions

ontology.description: Components that define the concepts and relationships in this ontology

ontology_mappings.description: Collection of ontology maps from logical models

OntologyComponent.description: Ontology component that defines a single concept and any relationships that are keyed primarily by that concept

relationships.description: Defines relationships that pertain primarily to the concept defined in this component

Relationship.description: Relationship between concepts in the ontology

derived_by.description: Expressions that define how this concept is derived

verbalizes.description: Natural language expressions that verbalize this relationship

Concept.description: Defines a concept in the ontology

extends.description: Indicates that this concept extends one or more other concepts

derived_by.description: Expressions that define how this concept is derived

identify_by.description: Names of relationships to use as the preferred identifier of this concept

requires.description: Expressions that constrain the population of this concept

ConceptMapping.description: Mappings from logical model constructs to some ontology component

concept.description: Name of the concept whose part of the ontology we are mapping to

object_mappings.description: Mappings from logical constructs that populate the concept in this component. Valid only when the concept is an entity type

link_mappings.description: Mappings from logical model relationships to ontology relationships pertaining to the mapped concept

ConceptType.description: A concept is either an entity type or a value type

ReferentMapping.description: Mapping from logical model constructs to a relationship used to references some entity type in the ontology

concept.description: Name of the concept playing this role

name.description: Optional name of this role, used when the same concept plays multiple roles in the same relationship

ObjectMapping.description: Pattern of logical-level expressions for identifying objects of some concept using the values in one or more fields

concept.description: Name of the concept whose objects we are mapping to

referent_mappings.description: Maps logical-model constructs to referent relationships of this entity type

LinkMapping.description: Mapping from logical schema to the links of relationships in the ontology

relationship.description: Name of relationship being populated by this mapping node

children.description: Relationship maps at the next level in this hierarchy

OntologyMap.description: Map from the constructs of some logical model to some ontology

description.description: Human-readable description of this ontology map

concept_mappings.description: Maps logical model constructs to some concept and its relationships in the ontology
